title: Fig. 1 in The relationships among Leishmania infantum and phyllostomid bats assessed by histopathological and molecular assays
author: Silva, Alanderson Rodrigues da
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1. Photomicrography of wing skin of an adult male Artibeus planirostris qPCR Leishmania infantum positive. No amastigotes forms were found, only unspecific mild mixed inflammatory infiltrate of dermis with mononuclear (arrow) and polymorphonuclear cells (arrowhead), H&E, 40x objective.
steps_raw: Fig. 1. Photomicrography of wing skin of an adult male Artibeus planirostris qPCR Leishmania infantum positive. No amastigotes forms were found, only unspecific mild mixed inflammatory infiltrate of dermis with mononuclear (arrow) and polymorphonuclear cells (arrowhead), H&E, 40x objective.
